languageSelection.title: Choose your language
languageSelection.subtitle: Select the main language for the app

auth.chooseEntry: Choose how to enter: with Google for cloud sync or as a guest without cloud sync.
auth.firebaseConfigMissing: Configure VITE_FIREBASE_* to enable login (locally and in GitHub Actions Secrets/Variables).

settings.title: Settings
settings.accountCloudDescription: Sign in to enable backup and sync across devices. The app still works offline.
settings.localMaintenanceDescription: Tools to reset the app and manage offline data.
settings.notificationsDescription: Enable local reminders to stay consistent with training.
settings.backupJsonDescription: Export and import all app data in JSON format (routines, trainings, PRs, measurements, etc.).
settings.pdfSummaryDescription: Generate a PDF summary of your progress: profile, trainings, PRs and body measurements.
settings.csvExportDescription: Export and import trainings in CSV for external analysis.
